text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first glance, Matikanetannhauser just looks
like your ordinary Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this, all of her friends vouch for her
unwavering optimism when faced with situations
that would cause most Umamusume to get cold
feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa points out to an oblivious
Matikanetannhauser that her optimism is her
greatest strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the director's words, she becomes filled
with newfound energy and motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my days chasing victory with the
ordinary, slightly clumsy, but most importantly,
hardworking Matikanetannhauser begin.
